case_title: PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC VS. ARLENE SALGUERO ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALGUERO, ARLENE AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 128 CRESPI DRIVE, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.**
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SALGUERO, ARLENE AN INDIVIDUAL

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SALGUERO, ARLENE AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SALGUERO, ARLENE AN INDIVIDUAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED FEB-26-2018, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $120.08 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SALGUERO, ARLENE AN INDIVIDUAL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SALGUERO, ARLENE AN INDIVIDUAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED MAR-01-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SALGUERO, ARLENE AN INDIVIDUAL
